src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-location-permission-003 title: validate location permission request/grant flow module: location services source files or pages: 6 covered methods: preconditions: - user has not granted `access_fine_location` permission. - device is not in "mock location" mode. test data: test steps: 1. user launches the app and selects "seleziona la tua posizione attuale." 2. system prompts for location permission: - title: "condividi la tua posizione" - message: "l'app ha bisogno della tua posizione per mostrare i dati locali." - buttons: "consenti" / "non consentire". 3. user clicks "non consentire." 4. system shows: "impossibile caricare i dati. attiva la posizione per continuare." 5. user opens device settings → enables location → returns to app. 6. system requests permission again; user clicks "consenti." 7. system retrieves current location and displays it on the map. expected result: - permission dialog appears with correct text and buttons. - app handles denial gracefully (no crash). - location is successfully retrieved after permission is granted. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-suggestions-007 title: handle edge-case aqi values (boundaries) module: suggestion engine source files or pages: 1, 9 covered methods: preconditions: - system supports aqi categories: buona (0–50), moderata (51–100), insalubre sensibile (101–150), etc. test data: - aqi = 50 (boundary: buona/moderata) - aqi = 51 (boundary: moderata/insalubre sensibile) - aqi = 150 (boundary: insalubre sensibile/insalubre) - aqi = 300 (invalid, clamp to "pericolosa") test steps: 1. user selects a location with aqi = 50. 2. system displays suggestion for "buona" category. 3. user selects a location with aqi = 51. 4. system displays suggestion for "moderata" category. 5. user selects a location with aqi = 150. 6. system displays suggestion for "insalubre sensibile" category. 7. user selects a location with aqi = 300 (simulated via api mock). 8. system clamps to "pericolosa" and displays: - title: "emergenza: aria pericolosa" - text: "rimani in interno. chiudi finestre e porte." expected result: - boundaries are handled correctly (no miscategorization). - invalid aqi values are clamped to the highest category. - suggestions are appropriate for each category. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-api-integration-008 title: validate api response parsing (success/failure) module: api client source files or pages: 5, 6, 7 covered methods: preconditions: - network connection is available. - airvisual api is operational. test data: - **success response (200 ok):** ```json { "status": "ok", "data": { "city": "milan", "aqi": 75, "coordinates": [45.4642, 9.1900] } } ``` - **failure response (500 internal server error):** ```json { "status": "error", "message": "database connection failed" } ``` - **empty response (204 no content):** ```json {} ``` test steps: 1. system sends `gethttpdata()` for milan. 2. api returns success response (200 ok). 3. system parses data and updates the map with aqi = 75. 4. user triggers a manual refresh; api returns 500 error. 5. system displays: "impossibile caricare i dati. riprova più tardi." 6. user triggers refresh; api returns empty response (204). 7. system displays: "nessun dato disponibile per questa posizione." expected result: - success response updates the map correctly. - error responses show user-friendly messages. - empty responses are handled without crashes. unit: project:
